# programs.pyradio

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.pyradio`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `programs.pyradio.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable pyradio. |
| `programs.pyradio.package` | `null or package` | The pyradio package to use. |
| `programs.pyradio.settings` | `attribute set of (string or signed integer or boolean)` | Options to add to the PyRadio {file}`config` file. See <https://github.com/coderholic/pyradio/blob/master/pyradio/config> for available options. |
| `programs.pyradio.stations` | `list of (submodule)` | Radio stations to add to the {file}`stations.csv` file. If empty, {file}`stations.csv` defaults to the built-in playlist. To add a group, add a station with the url set to "-" and the name set to the name of the group. Its order in the list will be where it appears in `pyradio`. |
| `programs.pyradio.stations.*.buffering` | `null or (submodule)` | Buffering configuration to apply to the station. |
| `programs.pyradio.stations.*.buffering.bitrate` | `positive integer, meaning >0` | Bitrate of the stream in kbps (modify only if using MPlayer). |
| `programs.pyradio.stations.*.buffering.seconds` | `positive integer, meaning >0` | Number of seconds to buffer the stream. |
| `programs.pyradio.stations.*.encoding` | `string` | Encoding of the station's metadata block. |
| `programs.pyradio.stations.*.forceHttp` | `boolean` | If enabled, the connection is forced to use http (note when false it can either use http or https). |
| `programs.pyradio.stations.*.iconUrl` | `string` | URL of an icon to be shown in desktop notifications. |
| `programs.pyradio.stations.*.name` | `string` | Display name of the radio station. |
| `programs.pyradio.stations.*.profile` | `string` | Name of the profile to use when using mpv or mplayer. |
| `programs.pyradio.stations.*.url` | `string` | Stream URL of the radio station. |
| `programs.pyradio.stations.*.volume` | `integer between 0 and 130 (both inclusive)` | Volume to use for the station. |
